title: Health Information for All of Us Research Program Participants
text:
sh | Spanish | Multiple Languages 
What is MedlinePlus? 
What is MedlinePlus? 
MedlinePlus is an online health information resource from the National Library of Medicine (NLM) for patients and their families and friends.
Learn more about MedlinePlus 
What is the All of Us Research Program? 
What is the All of Us Research Program? 
The All of Us Research Program is a large research program run by the National Institutes of Health (NIH). The goal is to help researchers understand more about why people get sick or stay healthy.
Learn more about the All of Us Research Program 
Other Helpful Resources from NLM 
Other Helpful Resources from NLM 
ClinicalTrials.gov 
A database of privately and publicly funded clinical studies conducted around the world.
PubMed 
Citations and abstracts for medical journal articles, plus some links to full text articles via publishers and PubMed Central .
